scripts.dev: npm run build -w @ledgent/contracts && npm run dev --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ledgent/contracts && npm run build -w @ledgent/api && npm run build -w @ledgent/web
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @ledgent/contracts && npm run lint -w @ledgent/api && npm run lint -w @ledgent/web
